job_description: We are looking for a Senior Python Engineer to join our platform team. You will design and build scalable microservices handling millions of requests per day. job_description: Brightwave AI is hiring an ML Infrastructure Engineer to own our training and inference pipelines. Responsibilities: building internal ML platforms, optimizing GPU workloads, integrating with MLflow and Ray. Stack: Python, PyTorch, Kubernetes, Terraform, GCP. You will work closely with research and product teams to ship models to production fast.

Join our small but mighty backend team to build the next version of our SaaS product. We use Python (Flask), MySQL, Redis, and deploy on DigitalOcean. You'll own features end-to-end — from API design to deployment. Looking for someone who is self-driven, communicates well, and cares about users.
